biological_replicate: we used the human acute myeloid leukemia cell line THP-1 as a main model...
technical_replicate: we performed immunoprecipitation followed by mass spectrometry-based identification of associated proteins.
experimental_design: To determine whether the two KAT8-containing complexes are required for growth of human cells, we performed CRISPR-mediated knockout (KO) of each subunit followed by a competition assay with wild-type cells.
factor_value: we performed global transcriptomics (RNA sequencing [RNA-seq]) and proteomics profiling following CRISPRi KD of KANSL2, KANSL3, and KAT8.
number_of_fractions: the samples were pre-fractionated into 30 high pH fractions.
number_of_biological_replicates: we used the human acute myeloid leukemia cell line THP-1 as a main model...
